name: ecom-microservices
description: Production-grade e-commerce / event-booking microservices template (NestJS, Kafka, Prisma, Redis, Elasticsearch, GraphQL).
author: StudyNote

scripts.build:all: nest build api-gateway && nest build user-service && nest build booking-service && nest build payment-service && nest build search-service
scripts.prisma:generate: prisma generate --schema=apps/user-service/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema=apps/booking-service/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema=apps/payment-service/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:migrate: prisma migrate dev --schema=apps/user-service/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma migrate dev --schema=apps/booking-service/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma migrate dev --schema=apps/payment-service/prisma/schema.prisma
